message:
fix(transport): correct consumed_slots on weighted selection break

When the weighted quorum selector found enough endpoints and broke out
of the loop, consumed_slots was set to 1 instead of the actual weight
span consumed. This biased the counter advancement for subsequent
selections. Use the proper block_end - slot span on break.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
